description.ko: 거대한 홀로그램과 고속 광운이 일렁이는 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 메가시티 협곡입니다.
description.en: A rain-drenched cyberpunk megacity canyon shimmering with massive holograms and high-speed light trails.

prompt: A cinematic vertical low-angle shot of NEON-V, featuring a massive #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic dragon winding through towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on the wet metallic structures. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a moody and romantic futuristic urban atmosphere.
